items.title_original: People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
items.title_neutral: People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
items.excerpt: Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’ People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster. Traoré took power in a coup…
